chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constitutional Petition No. D- 869 of 2012. Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge 1.For orders on M.A No. 898of 2018. 2.For orders on M.A No. 4071 of 2012. 3.For hearing of main case. 02.02.2022. Petitioner in person. Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, A.A.G. ===== It is contended by the petitioners that they have qualified the requisite test, therefore, the respondents be directed to appoint them as Clerk and Assistant respectively. Learned Addl.A.G Sindh by making reference to the comments filed by respondents No.2 and 3 has sought for dismissal of the instant constitutional petition by contending that the petitioners have failed to qualify the requisite test for their appointment. We have considered the above arguments and perused the record. The controversy as to whether the petitioners have qualified or failed to qualify the requisite test for their appointment as Clerk and Assistant in Criminal Prosecution Service Wing, being factual could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed accordingly together with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE
